question: In Wix, what are the initial steps to add and configure a testimonial section with a three-item layout?
answer: First, click the 'Add' button at the top of the editor. Then, select the 'Testimonials' section from the left sidebar and drag it into the main editing area. Finally, choose a layout featuring three testimonials with images and descriptions from the displayed options.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Add' button located at the top of the Wix website editor interface.
From the left sidebar, the user selects the 'Testimonials' section option and drags it into the main editing area.
The screen displays various testimonial layout options; the user chooses a layout featuring three testimonials with images and descriptions.

question: In Wix, how do you customize a testimonial section by editing its header, modifying a testimonial entry, and updating its image?
answer: Edit the header title to your desired text in the testimonial section settings panel on the left. Then, modify a testimonial's description text within the list items section. Finally, update the associated image by clicking the 'Edit & Replace' button next to the placeholder image.
keypoints: The user edits the header title to "Experiences" in the testimonial section settings panel on the left side.
The user changes the item description text for one of the testimonials to "Robert Bert" within the list items section.
The testimonial image for Robert Bert is updated by clicking the 'Edit & Replace' button next to his placeholder image.

question: In Wix, what actions transform the testimonial section into a single-scrolling format and add supplementary information?
answer: Select a new single-scrolling testimonial layout with a circular picture frame from the section design options. Then, add a footer paragraph under the testimonial section by typing your desired explanatory text.
keypoints: A new testimonial layout is selected from the section design options, changing the display format to a single scrolling testimonial with a circular picture frame.
The user adds a footer paragraph under the testimonial section, typing additional information about customer feedback.

question: In Wix, where can you find the controls to change the layout design of an existing testimonial section?
answer: Access layout customization options by clicking the 'Design' tab in the top menu while the testimonial section is selected.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Design' tab in the top menu to explore more layout customization options for the testimonial section.
